title: AL's Skeletons Revamped: Classic Faces
description: Classic faces Add-on for AL's Skeletons Revamped
body:
![Classic Skeleton Faces logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35441f6f7b25b4dcd430c53290674c1b81322530.png)

# 

Do you not like the new, Revamped, face design in AL's Skeletons Revamped but like everything else?

This pack reverts it to the vanilla style faces.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/WUuHEOkPho4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>



Important:

In order for this pack to work, you need to load it above Skeletons Revamped.

Load them in order:

-This Pack

-AL's Skeletons Revamped (or AL's Skeletons Revamped x FA)
